Container.Name: golden-data-systems
Container.Overview: Golden Data Systems is a managed technology and intelligent infrastructure partner for growing businesses -- combining traditional IT support, industrial and OT experience, and practical AI automation into a single, accountable partnership. This app serves the Golden Data Systems marketing website, including the "Ask Our AI" assistant page, which proxies to an n8n webhook you configure below.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the Next.js server listens on inside the container

Config.Name: Chat Webhook URL
Config.Description: URL of the n8n webhook that powers the 'Ask Our AI' chat page (POST endpoint, see README)

Config.Name: Public Site URL
Config.Description: Public URL of the site, used for canonical links, sitemap.xml, and Open Graph tags

Config.Name: Contact Email API Key
Config.Description: API key for the transactional email provider used by the contact form (leave blank to log submissions only)

Config.Name: Contact Email To
Config.Description: Destination address for contact form notifications
